name: token-reporter
description: Per-operation token usage reporter for Claude Code 2.1.101+. Shows token counts, cost estimates, tool attribution, cache invalidation detection, worktree sub-agent breakdown, compact_boundary markers, CLAUDE.md reload events, and file activity when agents complete. Only outputs in debug mode (claude --debug).

OUTPUT_LIMIT_CHARS.title: Hook output character limit
OUTPUT_LIMIT_CHARS.description: Maximum character count for the report injected into the transcript. Claude Code's hooks reference states 10,000 chars; the 2.1.90 changelog says 50,000. Keep low (10000) for safety, raise to 48000 if your Claude Code version supports it.
